title: Fix demo browser_mixed.py for V2 API
description: Demo fails importing AnimationPlayer from pypixoo. Migrate browser_mixed.py to V2 sequence upload/playback API and verify on device.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Starting fix now. Root cause: demo still uses removed AnimationPlayer API.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Fix implemented: migrated demos/browser_mixed.py from removed AnimationPlayer API to V2 upload flow (upload_sequence command_list). Validation on device: precompute succeeded, sequence uploaded, native loop displayed, clean Ctrl+C stop.
